selection_without_outcomes.reason_for_activation: the previously missing official Cboe VIX and fixed-SPY execution inputs are now locally content-addressed

economic_hypothesis.mechanism: a positive option-implied variance premium compensates equity risk bearing; nonpositive premium maps to inactive cash
economic_hypothesis.primary_reference: Bollerslev, Tauchen and Zhou, Expected Stock Returns and Variance Risk Premia

signal.anchor: final qualified Cboe/SPY weekly anchor whose signal session lies in the calendar month
signal.realized_variance: (52 / 4) times the sum of squared log total-return factors across the four consecutive weekly anchor intervals ending at the current anchor
signal.weekly_total_return_factor: (current raw SPY close plus official cash distribution with current anchor ex-date) / prior raw SPY close; split identity must be complete
signal.state_rule: vix_variance minus realized_variance strictly greater than zero means 100% SPY; zero or negative means 100% inactive cash
signal.missing_rule: fail closed; no interpolation, carry, alternate VIX series, alternate realized-variance window, threshold, smoothing or source fusion

timing_and_account.decision: 09:00 America/New_York on the next accepted XNYS session after the selected weekly anchor
timing_and_account.holding: until the next selected monthly execution open
timing_and_account.decision_price: raw SPY close on the selected weekly anchor available before decision
timing_and_account.benchmark: buy-and-hold SPY over identical split endpoints with identical whole-share, cost, calendar, lifecycle and corporate-action accounting

splits.cross_boundary_rule: an interval is retained only when both execution endpoints lie in the same split; no state or portfolio carries across splits

state_support_before_outcomes.failure_rule: INPUT_BLOCKED_STATE_SUPPORT_INSUFFICIENT; alpha consumed; no strategy outcome access

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above SPY
arithmetic mean paired monthly active return strictly positive
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than SPY
validation.failure_rule: holdout remains unopened and lineage closes permanently

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above SPY
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than SPY
uncentered type-7 0.00078125 lower bound strictly positive

bootstrap.method: paired circular moving-block bootstrap over monthly active returns
bootstrap.p_value: (1 + centered-null means at least observed mean)/(10000 + 1)
bootstrap.limitation: the frozen block length is a dependence assumption, not proof of complete dependence coverage
